name: environment_ransomware_incident_forces_mesa_rig_utl
premise: A pipeline pressure anomaly coincided with a landowner’s unauthorized valve work; liability is unclear and the line remains pressurized. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment ransomware incident forces mesa rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Priya Dubois
agents.identity: I am Priya Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Hughes
agents.identity: I am Ravi Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Dubois must choose under rights versus utility. What does Priya Dubois do?
